info.name: Hospital Appointment System
info.description: API collection for Common, Appointment, Doctor, and Patient services with firstName/lastName user fields.

request.description: curl -X POST {{common_base}}/auth/register -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"email":"admin@hospital.com","password":"AdminPass123!","firstName":"System","lastName":"Admin","role":"admin","phoneNumber":"+10000000001"}'

curl -X POST {{common_base}}/auth/register -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"email":"doctor@hospital.com","password":"DoctorPass123!","firstName":"John","lastName":"Doe","role":"doctor","phoneNumber":"+10000000002"}'

curl -X POST {{common_base}}/auth/register -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"email":"patient@hospital.com","password":"PatientPass123!","firstName":"Jane","lastName":"Patient","role":"patient","phoneNumber":"+10000000003"}'
curl -X POST {{common_base}}/auth/login -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"email":"admin@hospital.com","password":"AdminPass123!"}'
curl -X POST {{common_base}}/auth/login -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"email":"doctor@hospital.com","password":"DoctorPass123!"}'
curl -X POST {{common_base}}/auth/login -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"email":"patient@hospital.com","password":"PatientPass123!"}'

query.description: Filter by role: admin | doctor | patient
Filter by status: pending | approved | rejected

request.description: Admin-only. Returns all users. Use ?role=doctor&status=pending to filter pending doctor registrations.
Admin-only. Approves a pending doctor or patient account. A role-based detailed approval email is automatically sent — no request body required.

Admin-only. Rejects a pending doctor or patient account. The 'message' field is required — admin must provide the rejection reason. The message is wrapped in a full professional email and sent to the user.
curl -X GET {{common_base}}/users/{{patient_user_id}} -H 'Authorization: Bearer {{admin_token}}'

curl -X PATCH {{common_base}}/users/{{patient_user_id}} -H 'Authorization: Bearer {{patient_token}}' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"firstName":"Jane","lastName":"Patient-Updated","phoneNumber":"+10000000033"}'

curl -X POST {{common_base}}/notify/email -H 'Authorization: Bearer {{admin_token}}' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"to":"patient@hospital.com","subject":"Welcome","text":"Welcome to UrbanCare"}'

curl -X POST {{common_base}}/notify/email -H 'Authorization: Bearer {{admin_token}}' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"to":"patient@hospital.com","subject":"Welcome","text":"Welcome to UrbanCare"}'

curl -X POST {{common_base}}/notify/email -H 'Authorization: Bearer {{admin_token}}' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"to":"patient@hospital.com","subject":"Welcome","text":"Welcome to UrbanCare"}'

curl -X POST {{common_base}}/notify/email -H 'Authorization: Bearer {{admin_token}}' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"to":"patient@hospital.com","subject":"Welcome","text":"Welcome to UrbanCare"}'
curl -X POST {{common_base}}/notify/sms -H 'Authorization: Bearer {{admin_token}}' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"to":"+10000000003","body":"Appointment reminder"}'
curl -X POST {{common_base}}/notify/sms -H 'Authorization: Bearer {{admin_token}}' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"to":"+10000000003","body":"Appointment reminder"}'
Creates the doctor's extended profile after their account is approved in common-service. Auth is obtained from common-service POST /auth/login.
Doctor or admin can update profile fields. To update the profile photo use the dedicated POST /:id/photo endpoint.

formdata.description: JPEG, PNG or WebP image. Max 5 MB.

request.description: Uploads the doctor's profile photo. The image is stored in common-service document store linked to this doctor. Returns the common-service documentId which is also saved as profilePhotoDocumentId on the doctor profile. Retrieve the image via GET {{common_base}}/documents/:documentId.

query.description: Filter documents linked to this doctor (e.g. profile photo)

request.description: Returns all documents linked to the given doctor ID, including the profile photo.
Sets availability slots for a specific calendar week. weekStartMonday must be the Monday of the target week in YYYY-MM-DD format. dayOfWeek: 0=Sun, 1=Mon … 6=Sat.
Admin-only. Permanently deletes the doctor profile document.

body.raw:
{
    "approvalStatus": "offer_reschedule",
    "adminNotes": "We have an available slot next week",
    "alternativeSlotId": "NEW_SLOT_ID",
    "alternativeDate": "2025-06-17T09:00:00.000Z",
    "alternativeDoctorId": "SAME_OR_NEW_DOCTOR_ID"
  }
